channel.title: Game Balancing auf Nicky Reinert
channel.description: Blog & projects by Nicky Reinert (Institute for Digital Challenges): web development & software development, SEO & analytics, hosting & DevOps, WordPress & Hugo, tools & projects, data protection & digital culture — plus content on AI and autism & society.

item.title: How to develop a balanced card game with Python
item.description: Join me on my journey from drawing for fun, to Excel, over Python to a, probably working and good balanced card game. But why? Shameless bragging: I own a Remarkable2 and from time to time I’m drawing random stuff on it. Just for the sake of recreation. I’m not a good painter. It’s no serious art, …
item.dc:subject: Lesezeit: 8 Minuten
